Blueprint is a qualification-first platform for robot deployment readiness. It helps operators and robot teams submit a site, review evidence, qualify the workflow, and route qualified opportunities into the right downstream lane.

High-priority public URLs:
- /
- /how-it-works
- /world-models
- /readiness-pack
- /qualified-opportunities
- /qualified-opportunities-guide
- /sample-deliverables
- /case-studies
- /pricing
- /solutions
- /contact
- /privacy
- /terms

Full content: /llms-full.txt

API endpoints:
- /api/site-content (public JSON summary of key pages and non-sensitive content)
